pi_items.source: examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/compose_credential_rotation/setup_task.sh (PROJECT_DIR is set to /home/ga/app-stack and docker-compose.yml is written there)
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/compose_credential_rotation/setup_task.sh (docker-compose service section names the PostgreSQL container "db")
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/compose_credential_rotation/setup_task.sh (docker-compose environment sets POSTGRES_USER and ADMINER_DEFAULT_USER to appuser)
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/compose_credential_rotation/setup_task.sh (docker-compose environment sets POSTGRES_PASSWORD and ADMINER_DEFAULT_PASSWORD to oldpass123)
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/compose_credential_rotation/export_result.sh (scripts reference SecureNewPass!2024 for database reconnection checks) and task description demand
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/compose_credential_rotation/setup_task.sh (INSERT INTO projects adds five hard-coded rows), confirming five seeded entries

privileged_info_summary: The task operates entirely within /home/ga/app-stack where the compose stack defines service "db" using appuser/appdb credentials with the documented old and new passwords, and the setup script seeds the projects table with five hard-coded rows, so all data is synthetic and locally created.
